results.title: The Swan Princess
results.why_similar: It shares a classic fairy tale structure involving a princess, a magical transformation, a true love's quest, and interference from a villain.

results.title: Luca
results.why_similar: It features sea creatures who must hide their true identities to experience life on land, exploring themes of belonging and transformation between worlds.

results.title: Enchanted
results.why_similar: It involves a fairy-tale character undergoing a personal transformation after being transported to a different world, navigating a forbidden romance.

results.title: The Princess and the Frog
results.why_similar: It centers on a transformative curse (turning into a frog), a determined heroine, a deal with a villain, and a romance that crosses boundaries.

results.title: The Sea Beast
results.why_similar: It explores the relationship between humans and majestic sea creatures, challenging societal beliefs and forging an unexpected bond, much like Ariel and Eric.

results.director: Clyde Geronimi, Wilfred Jackson, Hamilton Luske
results.title: Cinderella
results.why_similar: It features a kind-hearted protagonist oppressed by her family who dreams of a better life and receives magical help to transform her circumstances.

results.title: Frozen II
results.why_similar: It involves a journey to uncover a hidden family past connected to an enchanted realm, focusing on self-discovery and transforming the future.

results.title: Sleeping Beauty
results.why_similar: It features a princess with a forbidden romance and a conflict with a powerful magical villain, similar to Ariel's story.

results.title: Moana
results.why_similar: A headstrong daughter defies her father's protective rules to embark on a transformative ocean voyage to discover her true identity.

results.title: Pocahontas
results.why_similar: It centers on a spirited heroine at odds with her father's wishes and a forbidden romance between different worlds.

results.title: Frozen
results.why_similar: It features a heroine who feels like an outsider due to her unique power and conflicts with parental fear, leading to a transformative journey.

results.title: The Jungle Book
results.why_similar: A protagonist grapples with his unique identity and belonging, guided by a protective father-figure, similar to Ariel's search for her place.

results.title: Brother Bear
results.why_similar: The protagonist undergoes a magical transformation and a journey of understanding and empathy to reconcile with family, echoing a theme of personal change.

results.title: The Incredibles 2
results.why_similar: Violet's storyline is a coming-of-age arc about gaining confidence and embracing her unique powers, similar to Ariel's journey of self-discovery.

results.title: Aladdin
results.why_similar: A protagonist uses a magical bargain to transform his identity and pursue forbidden love while learning to be true to himself.

results.title: Mirai
results.why_similar: A young protagonist embarks on magical journeys to understand his family and his place within it, focusing on themes of belonging and change.

results.title: Vivo
results.why_similar: The protagonist embarks on a perilous journey to deliver a song, exploring themes of love, connection, and transformation through a quest.

results.title: Hercules
results.why_similar: Like Ariel, the protagonist feels like an outsider in his world and yearns for a transformation to find his true place and purpose.

results.title: Mulan
results.why_similar: The heroine defies strict societal and family expectations by transforming her identity to protect a loved one and discover her true self.

results.title: Apollo 10½: A Space Age Childhood
results.why_similar: It centers on a protagonist who yearns for a fantastical, larger-than-life experience beyond their ordinary world, much like Ariel's longing for the human world.

results.title: Raya and the Last Dragon
results.why_similar: A rebellious daughter, guided by her father's teachings, goes on a transformative quest that challenges her worldview and heals a divided realm.

results.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
results.why_similar: The protagonist discovers a hidden part of his identity and must mature into a new role while navigating complex family relationships and expectations.

results.title: Rise of the Guardians
results.why_similar: The story follows a magical outsider on a coming-of-age journey to find his purpose, belonging, and belief in himself.

results.director: Clyde Geronimi, Wilfred Jackson, Hamilton Luske
results.title: Peter Pan
results.why_similar: It features children yearning for a magical world of adventure away from parental rules, led by a rebellious figure offering escape and transformation.

results.title: Elemental
results.why_similar: A young woman from a closed-off community falls for someone from an opposite world, challenging strict family expectations and societal norms.

results.title: Klaus
results.why_similar: The protagonist undergoes a personal transformation by embracing a new community and purpose, moving from selfishness to selfless acts.
